title: [Moonsu] Better Hotbar
description: A complete change to the minecraft hotbar but without losing the essence.
body:
# A full hotbar remake of Minecraft!
### A complete redesign has been done using a wider color palette but without losing the essence of vanilla.
**_(Check the images tab for more info)_**

![Main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70e4f8758c3a0a806a05c72e266af8dafd1576fe.png)

### Can i use for my Modpack?
**Sure! no problem, but I would appreciate if you could leave credits.**

**Any questions or suggestions can be left in the Official Discord:** [Discord!](https://discord.gg/bGfyh9EXrT)
